title: Plushies Mod
description: Plushies Mod is a cute-based modification that features little toys. (menace sometimes)
body:
![Title for the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2deaaec4789ce34fe367847a27b3b6362a394a.png)

**WARNING: THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT AND IT'S NOT INTENDED NOR SUITIBLE FOR SURVIVAL GAMEPLAY.**

**Instead, this is a creative mod and may not be recipes included, I will slowly implement the recipes for every block later and you may be finding unfinished pieces and bugs throughout the mod.**

-----------------

About the modification.

This mod adds 50+ plushies (including variations.)

Here's the main cast!
![The main cast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b19d9ac869689fe82a7a37d78ff763786720518.png)
(Up left to down right)

Peter (♂️), Tom (♂️), July (♀️), Linda (♀️), Cameron (♂️), Parker (♂️), Null (○), Vermilion (♂️), Charlotte (♀️) and Jun (♀️).

But that's not all, you can find more plushies in the creative tabs and there's going to be more, more, more AND MORE PLUSHIES in the future!

-----------------

Q&A:

"How do I get the variants of plushies?"

In addition, you can use the stick to change the variants of the plushies. (Yes a wooden stick.)


"Why are some plushies have weird and unfinished textures?"

Because this mod is still in development, as I mention atop of the mod page.


"Is it coming to Fabric, Neoforge and Quilt?"

No, I don't have any on porting other mod loaders outside Forge


"Can I use it for my modpack and/or content?"

Yes, you may use my mod for your modpack or content, as long as you should give credit to me.

-----------------

PLANS:

- Plushies for Legacy Edition
- Original Characters
- Suggestions from Discord Server(s)

-----------------
